name: grain2

documentation_markdown:
### `grain2`

Easy-to-use granular synthesis texture generator.

**Reference**
- [Csound opcode overview](https://csound.com/docs/manual/grain2.html)

inputs.name: Frequency
inputs.description: Grain frequency in Hz.

inputs.name: FreqModDepth
inputs.description: Random bipolar variation of grain frequency in Hz.

inputs.name: GrainDur
inputs.description: Grain duration in seconds; changing it also affects grains that are already active.

inputs.name: Overlaps
inputs.description: Fixed number of overlapping grains.

inputs.name: GrainTable
inputs.description: Function table containing the grain waveform; it can change at k-rate.

inputs.name: WindowTable
inputs.description: Function table containing the window waveform, typically generated with GEN20.

inputs.name: RatePow
inputs.description: Shapes the distribution of random grain-frequency variation.

inputs.name: Seed
inputs.description: Seed for the internal random number generator; 0 or below uses the current time.

inputs.name: Mode
inputs.description: Bitmask controlling interpolation, continuous modulation, and initialization behavior.

name: grain3
description: Granular oscillator with independent frequency and phase modulation controls.
documentation_markdown:
### `grain3`

Granular oscillator with independent frequency and phase modulation controls.

**Reference**
- [Csound opcode overview](https://csound.com/docs/manual/grain3.html)

inputs.name: Frequency
inputs.description: Grain frequency in cycles per second.

inputs.name: Phase
inputs.description: Start phase within the grain waveform table.

inputs.name: FreqModDepth
inputs.description: Random frequency modulation depth applied to each grain.

inputs.name: PhaseModDepth
inputs.description: Random phase modulation depth applied to each grain.

inputs.name: GrainDuration
inputs.description: Duration of each grain in seconds.

inputs.name: Density
inputs.description: Average number of grains generated per second.

inputs.name: MaxOverlaps
inputs.description: Maximum number of simultaneously active grains.

inputs.name: WaveformTable
inputs.description: Function table containing the source grain waveform.

inputs.name: WindowTable
inputs.description: Function table containing the grain envelope window.

inputs.name: FreqRangePower
inputs.description: Power curve shaping the random frequency distribution.

inputs.name: PhaseRangePower
inputs.description: Power curve shaping the random phase distribution.

inputs.name: Seed
inputs.description: Optional random seed value.

inputs.name: Mode
inputs.description: Optional processing mode selector.
